pages.title: Ready Your Weapon
pages.text: Guns use the ammunition made for their caliber. Keep matching ammunition in your inventory, hold the weapon, and press $(thing)R$(0) to reload. Aim and fire as you would any held weapon, but save rounds: ammunition is valuable and every shot can draw attention.

pages.title: Weapon Controls
pages.text: $(thing)R$(0): Reload the held gun.$(br)$(thing)B$(0): Switch its fire mode when the weapon supports one.$(br)$(thing)V$(0): Switch scope or optic view when the installed scope supports it.$(br2)These are the default PointBlank controls. Other mods may use the same keys; change any conflicts in Minecraft's $(thing)Options > Controls > Key Binds$(0) menu.

Hold a gun and press $(thing)Y$(0) to open the modding menu. Select an attachment slot, then choose a compatible part from your inventory. Use this screen to inspect installed attachments and their effects before heading out. $(thing)Y$(0) may also conflict with another mod, so rebind it in $(thing)Options > Controls > Key Binds$(0) if needed.
